title: Architecture Spine
summary: 8 architecture decisions (AD-1 through AD-8) defining the system's invariants: flat Laravel, SSG-only frontend, REST API contract, CSS custom properties theming, admin content authority, Spatie media, unidirectional flow, queued email.

decisions.title: Flat Laravel structure
decisions.rule: All models in app/Models/, controllers in Http/Controllers/Api/. No DDD.

decisions.title: Frontend is static consumer
decisions.rule: SSG only (output: 'export'). No getServerSideProps, no DB from frontend.

decisions.title: REST API is the contract
decisions.rule: { data: ... } envelope. Zod schemas mirror API shapes.

decisions.title: CSS custom properties theming
decisions.rule: All visual tokens via var(--color-*). No hardcoded colors.

decisions.title: Admin is sole content authority
decisions.rule: All writes through authenticated API endpoints.

decisions.title: Spatie Media Library
decisions.rule: All uploads through Spatie. No direct Storage::put().

decisions.title: Unidirectional content flow
decisions.rule: Admin writes → MySQL → API → Next.js build → static HTML.

decisions.title: Queued email with DB fallback
decisions.rule: Messages saved before email dispatch. Queue retries up to 3x.
